content.en:
As soon as the forbidden bloodline creature died, everyone began to divide the blood lake.

The invincible Dao Ancestors have more, the strongest Dao Ancestors have less, and Ye Tian has fewer points than the Invincible Dao Ancestors, and he has no opinion.

However, when the blood lake gradually dried up, completely exposing a treasure at the bottom of the blood lake, the situation suddenly changed.

I saw that there were black-red crystals at the bottom of the blood lake, exuding wisps of life breath and forbidden rules.

"It's a blood crystal formed by the blood of a forbidden creature, and this is a forbidden blood crystal that can only be born after a long time of evolution! A forbidden blood crystal is comparable to a low-level forbidden weapon!"

A Dao Ancestor exclaimed.

The forbidden blood crystal is a transcendent thing, and it is also one of the existences that ignores the rules, so it cannot be captured by the divine sense.

Many glanced at it with their eyes, there were more than sixty forbidden blood crystals, and the Supreme Dao Ancestor and the Invincible Dao Ancestor here together were far more than sixty people!

"These forbidden blood crystals, we want them!"

An invincible Dao Ancestor announced domineeringly.

His meaning was very clear, these invincible Dao Ancestors wanted these forbidden blood crystals, and the strongest Dao Ancestors could leave.

"Why?"

A top-notch supreme Dao Ancestor was not convinced.

"Just by strength!"

The Invincible Dao Ancestors said coldly.

Wow!

A Supreme Dao Ancestor couldn't help it and rushed to the bottom of the lake as fast as he could, wanting to seize the Forbidden Blood Crystal.

He longs so much for the forbidden blood crystal!

The Forbidden Blood Crystal seems to be equivalent to a low-level forbidden weapon, that is because in the vast sea realm, forbidden weapons are very rare, but now in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, there are too many forbidden and strange things, so it is not too difficult to create a forbidden weapon.

Now if you want to exchange a low-level forbidden weapon for a forbidden blood crystal, it's too much!

Moreover, even when they were in the Vast Sea Realm, almost no one was willing to exchange Forbidden Blood Crystals for Forbidden Weapons, because Forbidden Blood Crystals were too useful.

The Forbidden Blood Crystal can repair the Origin Injury, which is enough to attract many Supreme Dao Ancestors who cannot be promoted to Invincible Dao Ancestor because of the Origin Injury.

In addition, the Forbidden Blood Crystal is one of the best cultivation treasures to enhance the power of the Dark Taboo, and it can also allow the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor to master the power of the Dark Taboo, so you can imagine how valuable it is!

If it weren't for the fact that the energy of the Forbidden Blood Crystal was too huge and too advanced for the True Ancestors to bear, otherwise the Forbidden Blood Crystal would also be a supreme treasure for the True Ancestors, and they could master the power of the Dark Forbidden at the True Ancestor level.

"Hahaha, as long as I capture some forbidden blood crystals, I can repair the origin injuries I have suffered in the past, and I can also make my dark forbidden power soar, and the forbidden body will reach the Xiaocheng realm or even the Dacheng realm, and my strength will skyrocket by leaps and bounds!"

Supreme Dao Ancestor - Youming Dao Ancestor said excitedly.

However, just as he rushed to the bottom of the lake and was about to take the forbidden blood crystal, a red light instantly pierced his body, killing him with one blow.

The one who shot was the invincible Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect - the Peerless Dao Ancestor!

"Wushuang Dao Ancestor, why did you want to kill our Heavenly Demon Sect's Youming Dao Ancestor, you can completely hurt him, there is no need to kill him!"

The invincible Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Demon Sect, the Bitter Lotus Dao Ancestor, said angrily.

The Heavenly Demon Sect is one of the Eight Heavenly Forces, and there was no invincible Dao Ancestor in the past, but now the strength of the major forces is skyrocketing, and the Heavenly Demon Sect has taken refuge in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and also seized this opportunity to give birth to an invincible Dao Ancestor, that is, the Bitter Lotus Dao Ancestor.

However, even so, the Heavenly Demon Sect was not promoted to the Nine Heavens Force.

The main reason is that the Heavenly Emperor Palace has raised the threshold of the Nine Heavens Force, and it is necessary to have ten Extremely Strong Dao Ancestors and more than three Invincible Dao Ancestors before they can rank among the Nine Heavens Forces, otherwise they can only be regarded as the Eight Heavens Forces.

In fact, in addition to the Heavenly Demon Sect, many Eightfold Heaven forces also gave birth to the Ninefold Heavenly Invincible Dao Ancestor, such as King Kong City, Heavenly Sword Sect and other Eightfold Heaven Forces, all of which gave birth to the Ninefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but there was only one Invincible Dao Ancestor, and his strength was not very strong, and he couldn't even beat Ye Tian.

"If he dares to snatch the forbidden blood crystal, that is to seek death!"

Wushuang Dao Ancestor said coldly.

Suddenly.

Someone found that the forbidden blood crystals disappeared one and another.

"Damn, there are still people stealing forbidden blood crystals!!"

The Peerless Dao Ancestor was furious.

Bang!!!

The power of the invincible Dao Ancestors extended into the bottom of the lake, trying to find the unknown person.

However, they couldn't find it.

Almost in a short period of time, nearly 50 forbidden blood crystals disappeared.

At this time, they didn't care, and went directly to the bottom of the lake to start snatching the remaining forbidden blood crystals, and the battle was a mess.

And almost in a short period of time, the forbidden blood crystal was snatched away.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already left with Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, and he did not participate in the battle to snatch the forbidden blood crystal.

However, he was very happy.

......

In another place, the Dark King, the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor, and others gathered together.

As soon as they met, the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor said, "Dark King, you just captured the Forbidden Blood Crystal, right?"

"Why does the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor think it's me?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"That stealth method is only used by you, and the invincible Dao Ancestor can't even detect it. Besides, you weren't there, so I know it's you!"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestral Dao.

"I don't admit it!"

Ye Tian responded.

He is not stupid, if he admits it, if the first-class Fire Dao Ancestor is promoted, it may not be a good thing.

Although the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor and him are the Dao Ancestors of the same force, it does not mean that the Dao Ancestors of the same force will not have intrigue and competition.

"No, it's not!"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor smiled slightly.

If it was an ordinary Supreme Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, he could also coerce and lure him to exchange for some forbidden blood crystals at a very low price.

But the Dark King is too powerful, and he is the strongest Dao Ancestor who has killed the commander-level forbidden Zerg, and he may not be able to beat the Dark King.

If the Dark King admits that he snatched the Forbidden Blood Crystal, he may trade a few Forbidden Blood Crystals through his connections.

But now the Dark King doesn't admit it, and he doesn't have a problem.

At this time.

There are still many good things in the Fire World, but the Invincible Dao Ancestors and most of the Supreme Dao Ancestors are not interested in looking for them here, but they go to the Wood World as fast as they can.

The world of wood is a world of countless trees, and the number of forbidden curiosities in this world is greater than that of the world of fire.

When Ye Tian and the others came to this world, they immediately began to collect forbidden and strange things.

It didn't take long for the forbidden curiosities here to be almost collected.

But soon, someone found a fragment of the Forbidden Continent in the Wood World, on which there was a Forbidden Spirit Root Tree, and it was a top-level Forbidden Spirit Root Tree, which was extremely valuable.

As a result, an invincible Dao Ancestor broke into that piece of the Forbidden Continent's fragment.
